title: 2018 Census – proposed products and services | Stats NZ

## 2018 Census – proposed products and services
08 March 2018, 5:00pm
2018 Census – proposed products and services provides an overview of changes we’ve made to our content, processes, and website and describes proposed 2018 Census product types and services.
